title: Monthly P&L Review Checklist
description: A structured checklist for reviewing your profit and loss statement each month.

sections.title: Revenue Check
fields: Any one-off revenue that should not recur?

sections.title: Cost of Goods Sold
sections.description: Direct costs of delivering your product/service
fields: Any COGS items growing faster than revenue?

sections.title: Operating Expenses
fields: Any expense that jumped more than 20%?

sections.title: Actions
sections.description: What to do based on this review
fields: Anything to flag for next month

howToUse: Complete this checklist within the first week of each month, after your books are closed. Compare each number to last month and to your budget. Flag anything that changed by more than 20%.
